title: invoice — authorization policies
description: Three policies, one per owned model. Every ability resolves through spatie/laravel-permission, then narrows by tenant scope + customer-scope (customers see only their own invoices via invoice.enforce_customer_scope middleware + the viewMine ability). Write actions on finalized invoices are refused at the policy layer (defense-in-depth alongside the observer). Every credit note action requires the credit_note_issuance entitlement gate + admin+finance role.

abilities.scope: any tenant member with finance+admin role; support role read-only. Members without finance role see own only via viewMine.
customer-facing. Auto-scopes to invoices where customer_id = auth.user.id (or one of the athletes they're guardian for).
admin + finance + support see any tenant invoice; customer sees own only
admin + finance only. NOT support role.
admin + finance only, AND invoice.status must be 'draft' (post-finalize is refused at both policy + observer layers)
admin + finance only. Requires all lines have tax_calculation_id set.
admin + finance only. Requires status='open'.
admin + finance + support. Idempotent — sends the same email again.
admin + finance only. Refused when status IN ('paid', 'partially_paid') — must issue credit note instead.
admin + finance only. Requires days_past_due >= config('invoice.dunning.uncollectible_after_days').
admin + finance only. Manual reconciliation for off-platform payments (check / wire / cash). Requires payment method + reference note.
admin + finance + support. Idempotent.
customer-facing. Also fires from email-tracking pixel with a signed token.
financial retention 7-10y; hard-purged by PurgeExpiredInvoiceDataJob only. Soft-delete only allowed for draft/void via observer.
unmasks customer PII on cross-tenant view. Escalation-only.
inherits parent invoice's view scope — support+admin+finance see all; customer sees only lines on their own invoices
admin + finance only, AND parent invoice.status='draft'
admin + finance only, AND parent invoice.status='draft'
admin + finance only, AND parent invoice.status='draft'
admin + finance + support see any tenant; customer sees own via viewMine
customer-facing. Auto-scopes to credit notes on invoices where customer_id = auth.user.id (or guardian of).
admin + finance only. Requires parent invoice.status IN ('paid', 'partially_paid', 'refunded', 'disputed', 'written_off') + credit_note_issuance entitlement.
admin + finance only. Sets applied_to_type + applied_to_id + transitions status issued → applied.
admin + finance only. REFUSED when status IN ('issued', 'applied') — issued/applied credit notes are IMMUTABLE.
credit notes are immutable except for the status transitions (draft → issued → applied OR draft → voided). No field mutation ever.
financial retention 7-10y; hard-purged only via TenantErased FK CASCADE.
